raw_message: Hi, I tried logging in this morning and keep getting a 403 error. My account is arcvault.io/user/jsmith. This started after your update last Tuesday.
core_issue: User is experiencing a 403 error when trying to log in after a recent update.
summary: A customer is experiencing a 403 error when attempting to log into their account (arcvault.io/user/jsmith) following a recent update. Please investigate the issue and determine the cause of the error to resolve the login problem.

raw_message: We'd love to see a bulk export feature for our audit logs. We're a compliance-heavy org and this would save us hours every month.
core_issue: Customer requests a bulk export feature for audit logs to save time.
summary: The customer has requested a bulk export feature for their audit logs to improve efficiency in their compliance processes. Please evaluate this feature request and consider it for future development.

raw_message: Invoice #8821 shows a charge of $1,240 but our contract rate is $980/month. Can someone look into this?
core_issue: The invoice shows an incorrect charge compared to the contract rate.
routing_note: Escalated — Billing discrepancy of $260 exceeds $100 threshold
summary: The customer has reported a billing discrepancy with Invoice #8821, where they were charged $1,240 instead of the contracted rate of $980/month. Please investigate this issue promptly and provide a resolution to the customer.

raw_message: I'm not sure if this is the right place to ask, but is there a way to set up SSO with Okta? We're evaluating switching our auth provider.
core_issue: Customer is inquiring about setting up SSO with Okta.
summary: A customer is inquiring about the possibility of setting up Single Sign-On (SSO) with Okta as they are considering switching their authentication provider. Please provide them with the necessary information and guidance on how to implement SSO with Okta.

raw_message: Your dashboard stopped loading for us around 2pm EST. Checked our end — it's definitely on yours. Multiple users affected.
core_issue: The dashboard stopped loading for multiple users around 2pm EST.
routing_note: Escalated — Escalation keyword detected: 'multiple users affected'
summary: The customer reported that their dashboard stopped loading around 2pm EST, affecting multiple users. Please investigate the issue urgently to identify and resolve the outage.
